pi_items.source: task.json description field specifies product name to create as 'Tech Essentials Bundle'
task.json description field specifies product type as 'Grouped product' and verifier.py checks for type=='grouped'
task.json description specifies category 'Electronics' which is created in setup_woocommerce.sh line 227

setup_woocommerce.sh lines 235-236 create two products: 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' with sku='WBH-001' and 'USB-C Laptop Charger 65W' with sku='USBC-065'. setup_task.sh lines 26-27 and export_result.sh lines 71-79 reference these same SKUs.

task.json description field specifies short description as 'Everything you need for a productive remote work setup.' which contains both keywords 'productive' and 'remote'. verifier.py line 149 checks for presence of these keywords in short_description field.

task.json description field specifies description as 'Our curated Tech Essentials Bundle brings together the must-have gadgets for anyone working from home or on the go.' which contains both keywords 'curated' and 'gadgets'. verifier.py line 151 checks for these keywords in description field.

privileged_info_summary: Task creates a WooCommerce grouped product named 'Tech Essentials Bundle' in the 'Electronics' category, linking two pre-seeded child products with SKUs WBH-001 (Wireless Bluetooth Headphones) and USBC-065 (USB-C Laptop Charger 65W). The product must be published with a short description containing 'productive' and 'remote' keywords, and a full description containing 'curated' and 'gadgets' keywords.
